subject: (no subject)
body:
May have HBJ interested in a development in Kensington that could be purchased for £80m and there would be 1.5% for me. So fingers crossed. Which way do you think the election will go? I had supper with Conrad B the other day who was praising Trump!!!

Sent from my iPad
